code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple product failures within ≤3 months
    - Replacement units showing identical defects →1
    - Explicit "never buy again" warnings with safety concerns →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Degrades significantly within 1 year despite proper use →2
    - Underperforms competitors while requiring more effort →2
    - Functional but creates new problems (odor/noise/workarounds) →2

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Equal pros/cons with conflicted recommendations →3
    - Temporary solutions with clear expiration timeline →3
    - Returned for non-quality reasons (size/style change) →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Explicit star deduction for specific flaws →4
    - Maintenance described as notable inconvenience →4
    - "Good but..." comparisons with clear limitations →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Aesthetic praise + core functionality excellence →5
    - Long-term problem resolution despite maintenance →5
    - Enthusiastic tone persists through inherent requirements →5
    - Flaws acknowledged but irrelevant to core value →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Ironing Context: "Inherent to material quality" →5 vs "Annoying extra step" →4
    - Problem Solving: "Solved my 5-year issue" →5 vs "Works for now" →4
    - Comparisons: Negative→2, Neutral→3, Positive-with-limitations→4, Superior→5
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: 2016 model failed in 2 months. Complete garbage!"
<Reasoning>Multi-year failure pattern with explicit condemnation</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Started leaking after 10 months - worse than cheaper brands"
<Reasoning>Premature failure despite proper use</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Returned. Only because I preferred tile over carpet"
<Reasoning>Neutral return unrelated to product quality</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Blender looks amazing and crushes ice perfectly!"
<Reasoning>Aesthetic + core functionality excellence</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "These napkins stay crisp but require tedious ironing"
<Reasoning>Maintenance framed as active burden</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "Cotton tablecloths need ironing but the luxury feel justifies it"
<Reasoning>Inherent maintenance accepted for quality</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Good for basic stains but struggles with deep cleaning"
<Reasoning>Clear functional limitation in key area</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "After 3 years, still solves tough pet stains effortlessly!"
<Reasoning>Long-term problem resolution despite use</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Works but loud enough to wake the household"
<Reasoning>New operational problem negates functionality</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Effective scrubber but confusing controls. Deducted one star"
<Reasoning>Explicit star reduction for specific flaw</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:

  5 star: OK

  gold 4 -> 5: 16
  gold 5 -> 4: 11
  gold 3 -> 2: 2
  gold 1 -> 2: 2
  gold 1 -> 4: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I bought this for vacations, not paying enough attention to the description. I thought it was just a fancier version of the small one that people buy for travel or if there is only one person using it. So when it got here I was a bit taken aback at h..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I can forgive the fact that there was blood on one of the math mats when I opened the package.  Things happen and I'm sorry that someone was injured.  What I can't get past is the fact that there are so many snags.  It's like these two mats were seco..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [2, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This table runner gets 5 Stars from me as it's better than I expected.

There are two basic pieces of fabric.  One is the backing, which is a solid blue; and the other is the front, decorative in a flag motief.  The blue backing is sturdy and gives t..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "This is a good tablecloth if you have kids. It wipes clean because it is vinyl. It also has a nice royal blue color with white polka dots. Very retro. This is great for outdoor use but you can easily use it indoors. After it isn't as new looking but ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "If you're looking for a very budget priced bed skirt, this would be it. I have two twin beds in my guest room and after spending more than enough on all the other bedding and decorative pillows and such on them, I knew I needed bed skirts but hated p..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "If there's anything you ever thought you wanted or needed in a trash can, this one has it. First, it's a semi-round, so it seems to have a smaller footprint than traditional round cans. Second, it has a silent opening and soft closing, which is great..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "So far this blender is working well for me. I've made a few strawberry banana smoothies for my kids and it's worked fine each time. One thing that wasn't skimped on was the looks. The build design of these blenders is very sharp looking, having a bri..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 37 errors, 15 borderline out of 80 examples."}
